title: agentskills/agentskills
friendlyTitle: Agent Skills makes AI workflows reusable
summary: The Agent Skills repository documents an open format for giving AI agents reusable capabilities, workflows, and domain knowledge. A skill packages instructions plus optional scripts, references, templates, and assets in a portable folder structure.
friendlySummary: This repo explains a standard way to package instructions and files so AI agents can learn a task when needed.
whyItMatters: Builders can use the specification to make agent workflows repeatable, version-controlled, and portable across compatible tools. Organizations can turn internal procedures into skills instead of re-explaining them in every prompt.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it to save a repeatable AI workflow once and reuse it across agent tools instead of writing the same prompt again and again.
